title: 'Akziyb #0392
definition:
Achzib = "deceit"

 1) a town in the lowland of west Judah
 2) a town in Asher by the Sea of Galilee
nasbUsage:
Definition: Achzib = "deceit"

 1) a town in the lowland of west Judah
 2) a town in Asher by the Sea of Galilee

    NASB:  deceptive, two places in Pal.
